name: Ice Group ASA
summary: Ice Group ASA provides telecommunications services in Norway and internationally. The company offers wireless data, voice, messaging, mobile broadband, telephony, and other related telecom services. It provides its services primarily under the ice brand. The company was formerly known as AINMT AS and changed its name to Ice Group ASA in August 2017. Ice Group ASA was founded in 2015 and is based in Oslo, Norway. Ice Group ASA is a subsidiary of Access Industries, Inc.
